mechanism: Config1: exact-sigma Gauss-Hermite only, no jump, no congestion
decision: promising, continue ablation

mechanism: Config2: exact-sigma + jump-quantile term (both scenarios)
decision: promising, larger gain than sigma-only, continue

mechanism: Config3: exact-sigma + jump-quantile + congestion-premium (both scenarios)
decision: cross-seed check required before promotion

mechanism: Config3 cross-seed check on seed 2025
decision: REJECT full-mixture-on-CONGESTED: sign-inconsistent across seeds

mechanism: Isolation test: jump-only (no congestion) on CONGESTED, seed 2025
decision: confirms jump term (not congestion term) is the CONGESTED instability source

mechanism: FINAL DESIGN: exact-sigma both scenarios; jump+congestion scoped to BASELINE only (_MIXTURE_MAX_B=10)
decision: STABLE across both seeds, promote to full test

mechanism: new_candidate full test, seed 42 (tuning)
decision: PROMOTE: +0.0023327 vs frozen reference

mechanism: new_candidate full test, seed 2025 (tuning)
decision: PROMOTE: +0.0014358 vs frozen reference, positive on 2/2 tuning seeds

mechanism: new_candidate DECISIVE HOLDOUT test, seed 987654 (never tuned on)
decision: PROMOTE as best_candidate.py: +0.0021884 vs frozen reference (0.7314848), +0.0020220 vs current candidate (0.7316512), reproduced on 3/3 seeds. Stage 1 (0.75) NOT reached (short by 0.0163).

mechanism: Phase 1: FULL (not subset) 20-instance BASELINE+CONGESTED oracle, seed 987654
decision: RIGOROUS ceiling for BASELINE+CONGESTED-only scope = 0.7440048, proves Stage 1 unreachable within that scope; corrects the earlier biased-subset overstatement of CONGESTED gain (was claimed +0.954, actually +0.4193)

mechanism: DENSE oracle sample, initial 3 instances
decision: promising but small/non-representative sample, extend

mechanism: DENSE oracle sample extended to 7 instances
decision: corrected estimate: real but smaller than initial 3-sample suggested (4/4 new instances already saturated); still the only category besides BASELINE/CONGESTED with measured non-trivial headroom; CAPSTONE oracle memory-infeasible (43.9GiB), analytically bounded instead

mechanism: Extend exact Gaussian-Hermite+Pareto-jump-quantile+congestion-premium mixture to DENSE (B=60), using DENSE's own public sigma=0.25/rho_jump=0.04/alpha=2.7; explicit set-based gating {10,20,60} to avoid accidentally touching MULTIDAY (B=40)
decision: PROMOTE: +0.0025078 vs frozen candidate; DENSE reached full saturation (was 9.991)

mechanism: DENSE-extended candidate, seed 2025 cross-check
decision: PROMOTE: +0.0014358 vs frozen; DENSE already saturated on this seed so no additional contribution here, but confirmed no regression

mechanism: DENSE-extended candidate DECISIVE HOLDOUT, seed 987654 (never tuned on)
decision: PROMOTE as best_candidate.py: +0.0024484 vs frozen (0.7314848), reproduced positive on 3/3 seeds, DENSE contributed a real (if small, +0.013) additional gain matching the oracle-predicted low capture rate. Stage 1 (0.75) NOT reached, short by 0.0161.

mechanism: Central contradiction test: check if frozen candidate already reaches ~0.805 on any of 13 previously-tested seeds (no new mechanism)
decision: RESOLVED: seed 8080 gives 0.8043 with ZERO new mechanisms (custom script). Confirms the 'contradiction' is seed-variance, not a bug.

mechanism: Official harness verification of seed 8080 finding
decision: CONFIRMED via official test_policy_real.py: 0.8043391, matching the custom-script estimate exactly. Central contradiction resolved.

mechanism: Source provenance audit: SHA-256 of all core production modules across ID7/ID8/test installations
decision: All 6 core modules byte-identical across 3 installations. No version drift. Rules out audit items #1 and #15.

mechanism: Trace-level equivalence test: independent first-principles reimplementation of profit/SOC-transition/action-bounds formulas vs production
decision: PASS: max absolute error 0.00e+00 across 25 timestep checks (20 trace steps + 5 isolated compute_profit cross-checks)

mechanism: Small-instance triple-method oracle validation: LP vs independent DP vs exhaustive search
decision: PASS: all three methods agree to 0.0000 (6 decimal places). LP oracle confirmed globally optimal, not just feasible.
